description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a predominantly white and gray color palette. The front facade includes a garage with a car parked in the driveway, a small patch of grass, and a main entrance door set into a recessed section. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the exterior, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and a pergola, ideal for relaxation or entertaining guests. The property is landscaped with a few trees and shrubs, adding greenery to the urban setting. The overall structure is boxy and geometric, emphasizing functionality and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a landscaped yard with patio seating. The design is minimalist, with white and gray tones and clean geometric lines.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, driveway with a car, main entrance, and a small lawn with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the patio area with outdoor furniture, pergola, and additional landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back patio, seating area, and a large tree partially obscuring the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and a clear view of the flat roof and minimal window placement.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a simple, flat overhang and no decorative columns, adjacent to a garage and a small landscaped area.
